name: Intercom
description: Connect to Intercom to sync contacts, conversations, and companies into Shielva.

install_fields.label: Access Token
install_fields.description: Intercom Access Token from Settings → Integrations → Developer Hub → Access Token.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync Intercom contacts and conversations into the knowledge base.

apis.name: List Contacts
apis.description: Return a flat list of all Intercom contacts (leads + users).

apis.name: Get Contact
apis.description: Return a single contact dict by ID.

apis.name: List Conversations
apis.description: Return a flat list of all Intercom conversations.

apis.name: Get Conversation
apis.description: Return a single conversation dict by ID.

apis.name: List Companies
apis.description: Return a flat list of all Intercom companies.

apis.name: List Admins
apis.description: Return a list of all admins in the Intercom workspace.

apis.name: List Tags
apis.description: Return a list of all tags in the Intercom workspace.

apis.name: List Segments
apis.description: Return a list of all segments in the Intercom workspace.
